title: Conquest:Architects
description: This is a brand new Add-On mod for Conquest Reforged. The main purpose of this mod is to allow builders to build realistic structures by providing them with a greater variety of structural blocks.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58a052ebde0cb5c697d9d1ac6775adcbf81a08a2.png)
# What is Architects
Conquest:Architects is a brand new Add-On mod that adds many new structural blocks. With this mod, you will now be able to build more realistic and beautiful looking structures. Although the mod currently contains wooden beam blocks, all kinds of new structural blocks will be added in the future. Architects only supports creative mode for now, but it may also support survival mode in the future.

# Future Plans
- New 3D Roof blocks
- More Beam and Timber Variants
- New Stone and Metal structural blocks
- With the new blocks ability to build structures such as cranes, catapults, trebuchets, windmills, etc.

#
For those who interested, I make streams on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/smaugthedeceiver) time to time. You can reach me there or on the Official [Discord](https://discord.gg/NBEPPf5r) server where you can get news about upcoming updates, technical support, suggest features, show off and discuss your worlds/builds.
